faqOverrides.question: Does Bybit have a mobile app?
faqOverrides.answer: Yes. Bybit has official mobile apps for iOS (App Store) and Android (Google Play). The app includes the full spot and futures trading interface, P2P trading, copy trading, Web3 wallet, Earn products, and account management. KYC identity verification can be completed directly in the app — the document scan and face recognition steps are designed specifically for mobile. The app consistently receives high ratings across both stores and supports all the same features as the desktop platform.

faqOverrides.question: Does Bybit have proof of reserves?
faqOverrides.answer: Yes. Bybit publishes regular proof-of-reserves (PoR) reports, allowing users to independently verify that the exchange holds sufficient assets to cover all customer balances. The reports use a Merkle tree verification method — you can check your own account balance inclusion directly on the Bybit website under the Security section. Proof of reserves was introduced across the industry after the FTX collapse in 2022 and is now considered a minimum trust standard for major exchanges. Bybit also undergoes independent third-party audits.

faqAppend.question: Is Bybit safe and legitimate?
faqAppend.answer: Yes, Bybit is a legitimate cryptocurrency exchange. It was founded in 2018, is headquartered in Dubai, and holds a Virtual Asset Service Provider licence issued by the Dubai Virtual Assets Regulatory Authority (VARA). Bybit serves over 30 million registered users worldwide and consistently ranks among the top 3 derivatives exchanges by trading volume. User funds are held in cold storage. Bybit is not available to residents of the United States, United Kingdom or Canada due to regulatory restrictions in those jurisdictions.

faqAppend.question: What is the Bybit referral code for 2026?
faqAppend.answer: The current Bybit referral code for 2026 is CRYPTOBONUSW. Entering this code during registration — or signing up via a referral link where it is pre-filled — unlocks the full welcome bonus of up to 30,000 USDT. The code is case-sensitive and must be present before you click the registration button. It cannot be applied retroactively after account creation.

faqAppend.question: How long does Bybit KYC verification take?
faqAppend.answer: Bybit KYC verification typically takes 2–10 minutes for automatic approval. You will need a government-issued ID (passport, national ID card or driver's licence) and a selfie taken via your phone's camera. After submitting, most accounts are approved automatically. In rare cases requiring manual review, the process can take up to 24 hours. You receive an email notification once verification is complete. Standard KYC (Level 1) raises your daily withdrawal limit to 1,000,000 USDT and unlocks P2P trading and futures.

faqAppend.question: Does Bybit charge fees for P2P trading?
faqAppend.answer: Bybit charges 0% fees for P2P trading — there is no platform fee for either buyers or sellers. The effective cost of buying crypto via P2P is the spread set by the individual seller above the spot rate. To minimise this cost, filter sellers by Best Price and compare their rates before placing an order. Bybit P2P supports over 100 payment methods and 100+ fiat currencies.

faqAppend.question: What are Bybit's spot and futures trading fees?
faqAppend.answer: Bybit spot trading fees are 0.1% for both maker and taker orders. Futures trading fees are significantly lower: 0.01% maker and 0.06% taker for USDT perpetual contracts. These rates decrease further for higher VIP tiers. P2P trading is free (0% platform fee). Fee discounts are available when paying with BIT token. By comparison, Binance charges 0.1% spot maker/taker and 0.02%/0.05% for futures — Bybit futures fees are slightly lower on the maker side.

faqAppend.question: What is the minimum deposit on Bybit?
faqAppend.answer: Bybit has no absolute minimum for crypto deposits — you can deposit any amount. However, to qualify for the welcome bonus, a minimum deposit of 100 USDT (or equivalent) is required. The recommended deposit method for lowest fees is USDT on the TRC-20 (Tron) network, which has a flat transfer fee of approximately 1 USDT from most exchanges. ERC-20 (Ethereum) network transfers carry much higher fees depending on Ethereum gas prices.

faqAppend.question: Can I trade on Bybit without completing KYC?
faqAppend.answer: No. Bybit now requires identity verification (KYC) for all meaningful account activity. Without verification, withdrawal limits are effectively 0 USDT for standard users, and access to P2P trading, futures derivatives and most promotions is blocked. Completing Standard KYC (Level 1) takes under 10 minutes and immediately raises your daily withdrawal limit to 1,000,000 USDT. Bybit is not a no-KYC exchange — if that is a requirement, consider MEXC which allows spot trading without ID verification.

faqAppend.question: What leverage does Bybit offer for futures trading?
faqAppend.answer: Bybit offers up to 125× leverage on BTCUSDT perpetual contracts. For beginners, the recommended starting leverage is 5× — this gives a buffer of roughly 20% price movement before liquidation. At 10× leverage, a 10% adverse move wipes out your entire margin. Preset leverage options in the trading interface include 1×, 3×, 5×, 10×, 25×, 50× and 100×. Bybit also requires a stop-loss to be set before confirming any leveraged order — a sensible risk management default.

faqAppend.question: How do I claim the Bybit welcome bonus?
faqAppend.answer: To claim the Bybit welcome bonus: (1) Register via a referral link with promo code CRYPTOBONUSW pre-filled. (2) Complete identity verification (KYC Level 1). (3) Make a qualifying deposit of at least 100 USDT. (4) Complete futures trading volume milestones. The bonus is distributed in tiers — the 20 USDT registration reward is credited as a trading voucher after KYC, and larger deposit rewards scale with your first deposit amount. All tasks must be completed within 30 days of registration. Bonus vouchers cannot be withdrawn directly — only profits generated from trading with them are withdrawable.

faqAppend.question: What are Bybit's withdrawal limits?
faqAppend.answer: Bybit withdrawal limits depend on your KYC verification level. Without verification, regular users cannot withdraw (the limit is ~0 USDT for VIP 0 accounts). After completing Standard KYC (Level 1), the daily withdrawal limit is 1,000,000 USDT — sufficient for virtually all individual traders. Advanced KYC (Level 2) raises this to 2,000,000 USDT per day. Limits reset daily at 12:00 AM UTC. These are Bybit-side limits; blockchain network fees and minimum withdrawal amounts also apply per coin.

faqAppend.question: Is Bybit available in my country?
faqAppend.answer: Bybit is available globally in most countries, but is not accessible to residents of the United States, United Kingdom or Canada due to regulatory restrictions. It is fully available across Europe (excluding the UK), Asia, Africa, Latin America, the Middle East and Southeast Asia. In some countries, Bybit may use region-specific domains or URLs. Always access Bybit via the official domain bybit.com or via a verified referral link to ensure you are on the genuine platform.

bybit.editorNote: Top pick for derivatives traders and high-volume users. The 30,000 USDT headline is industry-leading but requires significant trading volume — most standard users realistically earn 200–600 USDT in their first week. Copy trading and Web3 wallet integration are genuinely best-in-class features. Not the right choice if you need a no-KYC platform.
bybit.longDescription:
Bybit is a major global cryptocurrency exchange founded in 2018 and headquartered in Dubai, UAE. It holds a Virtual Asset Service Provider licence from the Dubai Virtual Assets Regulatory Authority (VARA) and serves over 30 million registered users worldwide. Bybit consistently ranks among the top three crypto derivatives platforms by trading volume globally.

The platform offers spot trading (1,600+ trading pairs), USDT and USDC perpetual futures (up to 125× leverage), options contracts, copy trading, P2P trading (0% platform fee, 100+ fiat currencies), a Web3 wallet with DeFi access, and Earn products including staking and liquidity farming. Bybit's futures fees — 0.01% maker and 0.06% taker — are among the most competitive on the market, making it the preferred choice for active derivatives traders over higher-fee alternatives.

The welcome bonus package for new users reaches up to 30,000 USDT across tiered tasks. The 20 USDT registration reward is credited after KYC. Deposit bonuses scale with your first deposit amount, and futures trading rewards are distributed across volume milestones. Most users completing a standard deposit and initial trades earn between 200 and 600 USDT. The maximum 30,000 USDT requires substantial ongoing trading volume.

KYC verification is mandatory for withdrawals, P2P trading, futures access, and all bonus claims. Standard KYC (Level 1) takes under 10 minutes and raises the daily withdrawal limit to 1,000,000 USDT. Bybit is not available to residents of the United States, United Kingdom or Canada.

faqAppend.question: Is Binance safe and legitimate?
faqAppend.answer: Binance is the world's largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and is a legitimate, regulated platform. It holds licences and registrations across multiple jurisdictions including France (AMF), Italy (OAM), Spain (CNMV), Poland (PFSA), Lithuania, and several others. Binance introduced mandatory Proof of Reserves in 2022, allowing users to independently verify their funds are fully backed. The exchange has been operating since 2017 and has processed trillions of dollars in cumulative trading volume. That said, Binance has faced regulatory scrutiny in various countries and is not available to US residents (who must use the separate Binance.US platform) or UK residents.

faqAppend.question: Is Binance available in my country?
faqAppend.answer: Binance is available in most countries globally, but is blocked or restricted for residents of the United States (use Binance.US instead), United Kingdom, Canada, Japan, and several others due to local regulatory requirements. Binance has actively obtained licences across the EU under MiCA regulations and is available throughout most of Europe, Asia, Africa, Latin America and the Middle East. To check your country's availability, visit binance.com — you will be redirected or shown a notice if your jurisdiction is restricted.

faqAppend.question: What is the Binance referral code for 2026?
faqAppend.answer: The Binance referral code for 2026 is CRYPTOBONUSW. Enter this code in the referral or invitation code field on the Binance registration page to activate the current new user offer — up to 19,800 USDT in task-based rewards. When you register via the button on this page, the code is pre-filled automatically so you do not need to type it manually. A referral code and promo code serve the same function on Binance — both unlock the new-user bonus campaign. The code must be applied before you complete registration; it cannot be added retroactively to an existing account. The total reward you receive depends on Binance's current campaign terms, your region, completing KYC verification, making a qualifying deposit, and completing any required trading milestones within the campaign window. Most users who complete an initial deposit and basic tasks realistically earn 50–200 USDT in trading fee vouchers.

faqAppend.question: How much are Binance trading fees?
faqAppend.answer: Binance charges 0.1% for both maker and taker spot trading orders for standard users. Futures perpetual contract fees are 0.02% maker and 0.05% taker. These fees reduce significantly for higher VIP tiers based on 30-day trading volume. Holding BNB (Binance Coin) in your spot wallet and enabling 'BNB fee deduction' provides a 25% fee discount, reducing standard spot fees to 0.075%. This makes Binance one of the more affordable exchanges for high-volume spot traders. Crypto withdrawals carry a fixed network fee per coin — USDT on TRC-20 is typically around 1 USDT.

faqAppend.question: Does Binance require KYC verification?
faqAppend.answer: Yes, Binance requires identity verification (KYC) for full account access. Without verification, accounts have very limited withdrawal capabilities and cannot access fiat deposit/withdrawal services. Basic verification (name, date of birth, country) takes under a minute and raises limits slightly. Intermediate verification (government ID + selfie) takes 2–15 minutes and unlocks full withdrawal limits, P2P trading, and fiat services. Advanced verification adds address proof and is required for the highest transaction limits. KYC is enforced globally following regulatory changes introduced in 2021.

faqAppend.question: What is Binance's withdrawal limit?
faqAppend.answer: Binance withdrawal limits vary by verification level. Without KYC, the daily withdrawal limit is 0.06 BTC equivalent. After Basic Plus verification, this increases to 100 BTC equivalent per day — sufficient for most individual traders. There is no per-transaction cap, only the 24-hour rolling limit. Cryptocurrency withdrawal fees are fixed per coin and network: USDT TRC-20 costs approximately 1 USDT; BTC on the Bitcoin network costs around 0.0005 BTC. Always confirm network fee amounts on the withdrawal screen before confirming.

faqAppend.question: What is BNB and how does it reduce Binance fees?
faqAppend.answer: BNB (Binance Coin) is the native utility token of the Binance ecosystem. Holding BNB in your Binance spot wallet and enabling 'Use BNB for fees' in account settings reduces your spot trading fees by 25% — from the standard 0.1% to 0.075%. BNB is also used for Binance Smart Chain (BSC) gas fees, Launchpad participation, and various other platform features. The BNB burn mechanism periodically reduces the total supply, which has historically supported the token's value. BNB is freely tradeable on Binance and most other major exchanges.

faqAppend.question: Does Binance offer futures and leverage trading?
faqAppend.answer: Yes. Binance Futures is one of the largest derivatives platforms in the world by open interest. It offers USDT-margined perpetual contracts, coin-margined futures, and quarterly delivery futures. Leverage is available up to 125× on BTC/USDT perpetuals. Binance also offers Binance Options. Futures fees are 0.02% maker and 0.05% taker. Futures trading requires a separate account setup within the platform and carries substantial risk — Binance shows a mandatory risk warning and requires users to acknowledge understanding of leveraged trading before activating the futures account. To compare futures fees, leverage limits, and liquidity across exchanges, see our best exchanges for futures trading guide.

faqAppend.question: Does Binance have proof of reserves?
faqAppend.answer: Yes. Binance introduced proof-of-reserves (PoR) reports in November 2022 following the FTX collapse. Users can verify that Binance holds at least 100% reserves for all major assets using a Merkle tree verification method on the Binance website. Reports cover Bitcoin, Ethereum, BNB, USDT, BUSD, and other major assets. Binance also works with external auditors for additional assurance. The PoR data is updated monthly and is accessible to all users without requiring an account login.

faqAppend.question: What P2P payment methods does Binance support?
faqAppend.answer: Binance P2P supports hundreds of payment methods across 100+ fiat currencies. Common methods include bank transfer, Revolut, PayPal, SEPA, UPI (India), GCash (Philippines), M-Pesa (Africa), and dozens of regional mobile banking apps. P2P trading on Binance is free — Binance charges 0% platform fee for both buyers and sellers. The effective price difference is the spread set by individual traders. Binance's P2P market is one of the deepest globally, with high liquidity for major currency pairs like USD, EUR, INR, NGN, TRY, and BRL. For a comparison of P2P fees and payment method coverage across major exchanges, see our best exchanges for P2P trading guide.

faqAppend.question: How does the Binance welcome bonus work?
faqAppend.answer: To claim the Binance new user bonus using referral code CRYPTOBONUSW: (1) Open the registration page via the button on this page — the code CRYPTOBONUSW is pre-filled automatically. (2) Confirm that the bonus offer (up to 19,800 USDT) appears on the sign-up page — this is only shown when you arrive via a valid referral link. (3) Enter your email address and complete registration. If Binance shows a referral or invitation code field, enter CRYPTOBONUSW manually. (4) Complete KYC identity verification using a government-issued ID and selfie — most accounts are approved within 2–15 minutes. (5) Follow the task list in your Binance Rewards Centre — tasks typically include a qualifying deposit and trading volume milestones, all within the campaign window. Note: bonus vouchers are trading fee credits and cannot be withdrawn directly — only profits generated by trading with them are withdrawable. The 19,800 USDT maximum requires completing all volume milestones; most users completing a standard deposit earn 50–200 USDT.

faqAppend.question: What are the differences between Binance and Binance.US?
faqAppend.answer: Binance.US is a separate, independently operated platform for US residents, created to comply with US financial regulations. It has significantly fewer trading pairs (typically 150–200 vs. 1,400+ on Binance global), no access to Binance Futures, limited Earn products, and a smaller P2P market. Fees are similar (0.1% spot). US residents cannot access binance.com — attempting to do so while using a US IP address will redirect to binance.us. If you are a US resident looking for a globally comparable platform, Coinbase or Kraken are the recommended alternatives.

binance.editorNote: Best for: high-volume spot and futures traders outside the US/UK. The BNB fee discount, deep P2P market and 1,400+ trading pairs are unmatched — but US and UK residents cannot use the main platform.
binance.longDescription:
Binance is the world's largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume, processing over $100 billion in daily trades across spot, futures, and P2P markets. Founded in 2017 by Changpeng Zhao (CZ) and now led by CEO Richard Teng, Binance has grown to serve over 200 million registered users in 180+ countries. It holds regulatory licences and registrations across the EU (France, Italy, Spain, Poland, Lithuania, and others) and is actively pursuing MiCA compliance across the European Economic Area.

Binance's product suite is among the most comprehensive in the industry: spot trading across 1,400+ pairs, USDT and COIN-margined futures (up to 125× leverage), Binance Options, P2P trading (0% platform fee, 100+ fiat currencies, hundreds of payment methods), an NFT marketplace, Binance Earn (staking, savings, launchpad), Binance Pay, and the Binance Smart Chain (BSC) ecosystem. The BNB token reduces spot trading fees by 25% when held in the spot wallet, making Binance especially cost-effective for frequent traders. Standard spot fees are 0.1% maker/taker, reducing to 0.075% with BNB.

The welcome bonus for new Binance users is distributed across KYC completion, first deposit, and trading volume milestones. Bonus amounts are expressed as trading fee vouchers redeemable within 14–30 days. Binance introduced mandatory Proof of Reserves in 2022 — users can independently verify via Merkle tree that their balances are fully backed. The exchange has never suffered a total insolvency event, though it experienced a hot wallet security incident in 2019 (all affected users were reimbursed via the SAFU fund).

Binance is not available to residents of the United States (who must use the separate, restricted Binance.US platform), United Kingdom, or Canada. Full account functionality — including fiat deposits, the highest withdrawal limits, and P2P access — requires completing KYC verification. Intermediate verification (government ID + selfie) takes 2–15 minutes and is the standard requirement for most users.

Spot traders wanting the lowest maker fees (0.08% vs 0.10% at Bybit/Binance)

Options traders seeking diverse contract types and expirations
avoidIf: US residents — no global platform access, no US-specific version
India residents — access is restricted
Users expecting a large guaranteed bonus — mystery box average payout is $5–$50
verdict.keyLimitation: The mystery box bonus is random — despite a theoretical $10,000 maximum, the published probability table shows the vast majority of users receive $5–$50. Expected value is lower than equivalent Bybit or MEXC offers.

faqAppend.question: Is OKX safe and legitimate?
faqAppend.answer: OKX is a legitimate major cryptocurrency exchange founded in 2017 (originally OKCoin, rebranded to OKX in 2022). It is licensed by the Dubai Virtual Assets Regulatory Authority (VARA) and holds a Digital Asset Business licence from the Securities Commission of the Bahamas (SCB). OKX consistently ranks among the top five global exchanges by derivatives volume and serves 50+ million users. It publishes regular proof-of-reserves reports using Merkle tree verification. OKX is not available to US residents.

faqAppend.question: What is the OKX mystery box bonus?
faqAppend.answer: The OKX mystery box is the exchange's gamified welcome bonus mechanic. New users who register with a referral code receive a mystery box after completing qualifying tasks (typically: KYC completion + a minimum deposit of $50 or more). Opening the box reveals a random reward — amounts typically range from $5 to $10,000 in crypto, though the vast majority of boxes contain rewards in the $5–$50 range. OKX publishes the probability distribution table before you open the box, so you can see the exact odds for each tier. The reward is credited as a trading bonus voucher, not directly withdrawable cash.

faqAppend.question: What is the OKX referral code for 2026?
faqAppend.answer: The current OKX referral code for 2026 is CRYPTOBONUSW. Enter this code on the OKX registration page in the 'Referral Code' field to activate the mystery box welcome bonus. The code must be entered before completing registration — it cannot be applied to an existing account. Once you register and complete the required tasks, your mystery box will appear in the Rewards Center in your account dashboard.

faqAppend.question: Does OKX require KYC verification?
faqAppend.answer: OKX has tiered KYC requirements. Basic verification (email/phone + country) allows limited account access. Level 1 KYC (name, date of birth, nationality, ID number) unlocks standard crypto deposit and withdrawal with a 10 BTC daily withdrawal limit. Level 2 KYC (government ID photo + facial recognition) raises this to 200 BTC per day and enables full fiat services. KYC is processed automatically within minutes in most cases. Residents of certain countries may be asked for additional documentation. Without any KYC, deposit and withdrawal functionality is heavily restricted.

faqAppend.question: How much are OKX trading fees?
faqAppend.answer: OKX spot trading fees are 0.08% maker and 0.10% taker for standard (VIP 0) users — slightly lower than Binance and Bybit on the maker side. Futures perpetual fees are 0.02% maker and 0.05% taker. Holding OKB (OKX's native token) and reaching higher trading tiers reduces fees further. OKX also offers a fee discount when paying with OKB. Trading fee rates are tiered by 30-day volume: starting at $0 and scaling up to institutional tiers. Withdrawal fees vary by coin and network — USDT on TRC-20 is typically 1 USDT.

faqAppend.question: What countries is OKX available in?
faqAppend.answer: OKX is available in most countries globally but excludes the United States (due to CFTC/SEC regulations) and has restricted access in India following regulatory uncertainty. OKX actively holds licences in Dubai (VARA) and the Bahamas (SCB) and is pursuing further regulatory coverage. The platform is fully available across Europe, Southeast Asia, Africa, Latin America, and the Middle East. US residents cannot open accounts on the global OKX platform — there is no dedicated OKX US version.

faqAppend.question: What is the OKX Web3 wallet?
faqAppend.answer: OKX Web3 Wallet is a self-custodial multi-chain wallet built into the OKX platform and mobile app. It supports 100+ blockchains, connects to DeFi protocols, DEXs, NFT marketplaces, and Web3 applications without a separate browser extension (though a Chrome extension is also available). Unlike your OKX exchange balance, the Web3 Wallet is non-custodial — OKX does not hold your private keys. It supports hardware wallet integration and has a built-in DEX aggregator for swapping tokens across chains. This is one of OKX's strongest differentiating features against Binance and Bybit.

faqAppend.question: Does OKX have proof of reserves?
faqAppend.answer: Yes. OKX has published proof-of-reserves (PoR) reports since 2022. The reports use a Merkle tree verification system that allows individual users to confirm their balance is included in the reserve audit. OKX publishes reserve ratios for Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT, USDC, and other major assets — all maintained above 100% reserves. Reports are audited by independent third-party firms. The PoR page on OKX also shows real-time reserve data updates.

faqAppend.question: What are OKX's withdrawal limits?
faqAppend.answer: OKX withdrawal limits are set by KYC level. Without KYC, withdrawals are not available. With Level 1 KYC (basic ID info), the 24-hour crypto withdrawal limit is 10 BTC equivalent. With Level 2 KYC (government ID photo), the limit rises to 200 BTC equivalent per day — sufficient for the vast majority of individual traders. Fiat withdrawal limits are set separately and depend on the payment method and region. Network fees for crypto withdrawals are fixed per coin: USDT on TRC-20 costs approximately 1 USDT.

faqAppend.question: Does OKX offer copy trading?
faqAppend.answer: Yes. OKX has a copy trading feature that allows users to automatically mirror the trades of experienced traders. You can browse a leaderboard of lead traders sorted by ROI, win rate, assets under copy, and max drawdown. Copy trading is available for both spot and futures positions. You set the allocation amount and optional per-trade maximum. OKX copy trading is a strong feature — though Bybit's copy trading platform has a larger pool of lead traders and a longer track record. A minimum balance is required to start copying; the exact minimum varies by lead trader.

faqAppend.question: What is OKB and how does it benefit OKX users?
faqAppend.answer: OKB is the native utility token of the OKX exchange. Holding OKB provides trading fee discounts (up to 40% for large holders), priority access to new token launches via OKX Jumpstart (their Launchpad), and governance rights within the OKX ecosystem. OKB is also used for gas on the X Layer blockchain (OKX's EVM-compatible L2). Unlike BNB, OKB's primary utility is fee reduction and launchpad access rather than ecosystem-wide gas payments. OKB can be purchased directly on OKX with zero maker fees.

okx.editorNote: Strong second choice behind Bybit for derivatives traders. The mystery box bonus is genuine — small average payout but transparent odds. Best-in-class Web3 wallet and DeFi integration. Not available in the US or India.
okx.longDescription:
OKX is a major global cryptocurrency exchange and Web3 platform founded in 2017, operating out of Seychelles with licensed entities in Dubai (VARA) and the Bahamas (SCB). Rebranded from OKCoin to OKX in 2022, the platform serves over 50 million users across 180+ countries and consistently ranks among the top five exchanges by derivatives open interest.

OKX offers one of the broadest product ranges in the industry: spot trading (300+ pairs), USDT and COIN-margined perpetual futures (up to 125× leverage), options, copy trading, P2P trading, an integrated Web3 wallet supporting 100+ blockchains, a built-in DEX aggregator, NFT marketplace, and Earn products. The OKX Web3 Wallet is widely considered the best integrated non-custodial wallet in the exchange space — it allows seamless movement between centralised exchange funds and DeFi protocols without switching apps. Spot fees start at 0.08% maker / 0.10% taker, slightly undercutting Binance and Bybit on maker rates.

OKX's welcome bonus uses a mystery box mechanic — new users who register with referral code CRYPTOBONUSW and complete qualifying tasks (KYC + minimum $50 deposit) receive a mystery box containing a random reward. OKX publishes the full probability table before opening: the majority of boxes contain $5–$50 in trading vouchers, with low-probability tiers reaching up to $10,000. This is a transparent, auditable bonus structure — considerably more honest than headline 'up to X' claims from competitors. Proof of reserves is published monthly using Merkle tree verification.

OKX is not available to US residents and has restricted access in India. KYC is tiered: Level 1 (basic ID data) unlocks standard withdrawals up to 10 BTC/day; Level 2 (government ID photo + facial recognition) raises this to 200 BTC/day and enables full fiat services. The OKB utility token provides trading fee discounts and access to new token launches via OKX Jumpstart.

onboarding.note: Smooth KYC flow with liveness check; registration to first trade typically under 20 min

mexc.longDescription:
MEXC is a global cryptocurrency exchange founded in 2018 and headquartered in Seychelles. It has grown to serve over 10 million registered users worldwide and is most notable for two standout features: its no-KYC policy for withdrawals up to 10,000 USDT per day, and its industry-leading spot trading fee structure of 0% maker and 0.05% taker.

With over 2,400 trading pairs, MEXC lists more cryptocurrencies than virtually any other major exchange. It is consistently among the first platforms to list newly launched tokens, attracting traders who want early access to emerging projects. This breadth of listing means MEXC carries both high-quality established assets and newer, higher-risk tokens — users should apply their own due diligence before trading recently listed assets. MEXC also offers USDT-margined perpetual futures with up to 200× leverage, at fees of 0% maker and 0.01% taker, making it an extremely cost-efficient futures platform for experienced traders.

MEXC's welcome bonus is task-based: new users registering with code mexc-CryptoBonus receive bonus vouchers after completing KYC (optional for under-10K withdrawals), a qualifying deposit, and a trading volume milestone. The headline bonus reaches up to 10,000 USDT — realistic returns for standard users completing initial deposit and trading tasks are 50–300 USDT in vouchers. Vouchers are credited to the Rewards Center and have a validity period; direct withdrawal is not permitted, only trading profits generated using them.

MEXC operates under Seychelles incorporation and holds limited regional regulatory registrations, meaning it does not carry the same user-protection framework as FCA-, SEC- or MiCA-regulated exchanges. US residents cannot access MEXC. For traders below the 10,000 USDT daily withdrawal threshold who prioritise low fees, a wide altcoin selection, and privacy, MEXC is the strongest choice on this list.

faqAppend.question: Is Coinbase safe and legitimate?
faqAppend.answer: Coinbase is the most heavily regulated cryptocurrency exchange in the US and one of the most trusted globally. It is publicly listed on the NASDAQ (ticker: COIN), registered with the US Financial Crimes Enforcement Network (FinCEN) as a Money Services Business, holds a New York BitLicense, and is regulated or registered in numerous other jurisdictions including the UK (FCA), EU (multiple MiCA licences), Australia, and Singapore. Coinbase holds customer USD funds in FDIC-insured US bank accounts (up to $250,000 per user). Crypto assets are held in segregated cold storage. Coinbase has been operating since 2012 and has never had a significant security breach resulting in customer losses.

faqAppend.question: How does the Coinbase $10 Bitcoin bonus work?
faqAppend.answer: Coinbase offers new users a fixed $10 in Bitcoin when they register via a valid referral link and complete a qualifying purchase of $100 or more within 180 days. Unlike percentage-based bonuses at other exchanges, this is a fixed, guaranteed reward — there are no trading volume requirements, no voucher validity periods, and no conversion requirements. The $10 BTC is credited directly to your Coinbase account as real Bitcoin you can hold, trade, or withdraw immediately. This makes it one of the most straightforward bonus offers in the industry, even though the dollar value is lower than headline amounts at Bybit or MEXC.

faqAppend.question: How much are Coinbase trading fees?
faqAppend.answer: Coinbase has two fee structures depending on which interface you use. The standard Coinbase app charges a spread of approximately 0.5% plus a flat fee for small transactions — this is the most expensive fee structure on this comparison list, and is not recommended for active trading. Coinbase Advanced Trade (the professional interface, previously Coinbase Pro) charges 0.40% maker and 0.60% taker for users with less than $10,000 monthly volume — still higher than Binance, Bybit, or OKX but with no spread markup. For frequent traders, Advanced Trade is essential to avoid the high standard app fees.

faqAppend.question: What countries is Coinbase available in?
faqAppend.answer: Coinbase is available in 100+ countries. It is the most compliant exchange for US residents and is fully available across all US states including New York (BitLicense holder). It is also available across the EU (MiCA compliant), UK (FCA registered), Canada, Australia, Singapore, and most of Latin America. Coinbase has broader availability for fiat deposit and withdrawal services than most competitors — it supports ACH bank transfer, SEPA, wire transfer, and debit card purchases. Coinbase is not available in China, India (limited), Russia, or several sanctioned countries.

faqAppend.question: Does Coinbase require KYC verification?
faqAppend.answer: Yes. Coinbase has some of the strictest KYC requirements of any exchange on this list — it is a regulated financial institution in the US. All users must complete full identity verification (government-issued ID + selfie) before making any purchases, deposits, or withdrawals. This typically takes 2–10 minutes. As a US NASDAQ-listed company, Coinbase complies fully with FinCEN AML requirements and OFAC sanctions screening. If you want to trade without identity verification, Coinbase is not suitable — consider MEXC instead.

faqAppend.question: Does Coinbase offer futures or margin trading?
faqAppend.answer: Coinbase Advanced Trade offers limited futures trading for eligible US users through Coinbase Financial Markets, a regulated futures commission merchant (FCM). The selection of futures contracts is much smaller than on Bybit, OKX, or Binance — primarily Bitcoin and Ethereum perpetuals and limited altcoin futures. Leverage is capped at lower levels than on offshore exchanges. There is no margin trading on the standard Coinbase platform. For serious derivatives trading, Bybit, OKX, or Binance are more capable platforms. Coinbase's core strength is spot trading and fiat on/off ramp, not derivatives.

faqAppend.question: What are Coinbase's withdrawal limits?
faqAppend.answer: Coinbase daily withdrawal limits depend on your account level and verification status. For verified accounts, crypto withdrawal limits are typically $25,000–$50,000 per day for standard users and significantly higher for institutional accounts. USD withdrawal limits via ACH are $25,000 per day; wire transfer limits are higher. Coinbase does not have a public fixed-table of limits — exact limits are shown within your account settings under Limits. As a regulated institution, Coinbase also conducts enhanced reviews for large transactions.

faqAppend.question: Is Coinbase better than Binance for beginners?
faqAppend.answer: Coinbase is generally considered more beginner-friendly than Binance due to its simpler interface, USD/EUR direct purchase with debit card or bank transfer, robust mobile app, and regulatory trust (especially for US users). However, Coinbase's standard app fees are substantially higher than Binance — up to 0.5% spread plus flat fees vs. 0.1% on Binance. Beginners outside the US who are comfortable with a slightly steeper learning curve will pay 2–5× less in fees on Binance or Bybit. US-based beginners who prioritise regulatory safety and simplicity over fees: Coinbase. Everyone else: Binance or Bybit.

faqAppend.question: Does Coinbase offer staking rewards?
faqAppend.answer: Yes. Coinbase offers staking rewards for eligible assets including Ethereum (ETH), Solana (SOL), Cardano (ADA), Tezos (XTZ), and others. Staking APYs on Coinbase are typically slightly lower than staking directly on-chain, as Coinbase takes a commission (around 25–35% of rewards). For users who prefer the simplicity of staking within a regulated custodian rather than managing a wallet, Coinbase staking is convenient. Coinbase also offers a separate Coinbase One subscription service that increases staking rewards and waives trading fees above a threshold.

faqAppend.question: What alternatives are there to Coinbase for non-US users?
faqAppend.answer: If you are outside the US and looking for a regulated alternative to Coinbase, Binance EU is MiCA-compliant and available across the EU with lower fees. For UK users, Kraken is FCA-registered. For traders who want futures and high-leverage derivatives, Bybit (global, VARA-licensed) or OKX (Bahamas + Dubai licensed) offer more comprehensive platforms. For no-KYC trading with the lowest fees, MEXC is the strongest alternative. Coinbase's main advantages — FDIC insurance on USD balances and NASDAQ-listed regulatory transparency — are primarily relevant to US residents.

Founded in 2012 and headquartered in San Francisco, Coinbase holds a New York BitLicense, is registered with FinCEN as a Money Services Business, and operates under FCA registration in the UK and MiCA licences across the EU. This regulatory depth makes it the most compliant and institutionally trusted exchange available to US and European retail users.

Coinbase's product offering centres on spot trading for 250+ assets, fiat on/off ramp services (ACH, SEPA, wire transfer, debit card), USD staking rewards, and its Coinbase One subscription service. Coinbase Advanced Trade (the professional interface) supports lower fees — 0.40% maker / 0.60% taker — compared to the standard app's 0.5% spread plus flat fee structure. Customer USD funds are held in FDIC-insured US bank accounts (up to $250,000 per user), and crypto assets are stored in segregated cold storage with insurance coverage for breaches.

The Coinbase welcome bonus is a fixed $10 in Bitcoin credited after a qualifying purchase of $100 or more — no trading volume requirements, no expiry on the Bitcoin itself. This is one of the most transparent bonus structures in the industry: you get real Bitcoin, not a trading voucher. The trade-off is the low headline value vs. Bybit's up to 30,000 USDT or MEXC's up to 10,000 USDT. For traders who value regulatory certainty and simplicity over maximum bonus size, Coinbase's offer is the most honest.

Coinbase is best suited for US-based users, regulated-market investors in the EU and UK, and beginners who prioritise ease of use and institutional trust over fee efficiency. It is not recommended for active derivatives traders (Bybit or OKX are better), high-frequency spot traders (Binance or MEXC have lower fees), or users in jurisdictions where Coinbase has limited availability. Full KYC is mandatory for all account functions — Coinbase is not a no-KYC platform.

faqAppend.question: What is Bitget's copy trading feature?
faqAppend.answer: Bitget is widely regarded as the market leader in crypto copy trading, with over 90,000 experienced traders available to copy. The system allows users to automatically replicate the trades of elite traders in real time — for both spot and futures positions. You browse a leaderboard of signal traders sorted by ROI, win rate, maximum drawdown, and assets under copy. Setting a copy allocation, maximum per-trade amount, and stop-loss is straightforward. Bitget charges a profit-sharing commission to lead traders (typically 8–10% of profits) rather than charging copiers a platform fee. This aligns incentives: lead traders only earn when you profit.

This settlement is an important context for users evaluating trust — KuCoin has since strengthened its compliance programs and continues to operate for non-US users. User funds have been maintained throughout this period.

The no-KYC tier makes KuCoin appealing for users who prefer not to share identity documents, though the 1 BTC/day limit without verification is lower than MEXC's 10,000 USDT threshold.

KuCoin offers a comprehensive product range: spot trading (700+ pairs), USDT-margined and coin-margined perpetual futures (up to 100× leverage), copy trading, staking, P2P trading, a lending marketplace, and a Launchpad for new token sales (KuCoin Spotlight). KCS also provides trading fee discounts and Launchpad allocation priority.

An important context for evaluating KuCoin: in 2023, KuCoin and two of its founders were charged by the US DOJ and CFTC for operating without proper AML controls in the United States. This settlement has strengthened KuCoin's global compliance programs, and the exchange continues to operate for non-US users. User funds were maintained throughout this period. This regulatory history differentiates KuCoin from VARA-licensed Bybit, ASIC-registered Bitget, or NASDAQ-listed Coinbase.

Full advanced KYC unlocks fiat services and higher withdrawal limits. The welcome bonus of up to 11,000 USDT is one of the higher headline figures on this list and requires a deposit to activate.

The trust landscape around HTX is more nuanced than most exchanges on this list. HTX does not hold prominent licences from the FCA, SEC, MiCA, or VARA. For non-US users who prioritise Asian market access, derivatives breadth, and the historical credibility of the Huobi brand, HTX remains a viable platform. faqAppend.question: What is CET (CoinEx Token)?
faqAppend.answer: CET is the native utility token of the CoinEx exchange. Holding CET in your CoinEx account provides trading fee discounts (the discount scales with CET balance), access to VIP tiers, and priority allocation for new token launches on the CoinEx Launchpad. CoinEx conducts periodic CET buyback-and-burn events. CET is also used as a fee-payment method in the CoinEx Smart Chain ecosystem. For regular users, the primary benefit of CET is reducing trading fees from the standard 0.2% to lower tiers.

faqAppend.question: How does the CoinEx welcome bonus work?
faqAppend.answer: CoinEx's welcome bonus of up to 500 USDT is structured as task-based rewards available after registration. Unlike most exchanges on this list, some CoinEx bonus tasks can be completed without a deposit — making it one of the few 'no-deposit bonus' options available. Tasks may include email/phone registration, a small initial trade, and various activity milestones. Reward vouchers have validity periods and cannot be withdrawn directly. The $500 ceiling is lower than most competitors, but the no-deposit accessibility is a genuine differentiator for users who want to test the platform before committing funds.

coinex.editorNote: Lowest barrier to entry on this list — no KYC, no deposit required. Bonus is modest and the platform smaller, but it is the cleanest no-commitment option for users testing the waters before committing real funds. Note: compensated all users after 2023 security incident.
coinex.longDescription:
CoinEx is a global cryptocurrency exchange founded in 2017 by ViaBTC, one of the world's oldest and largest Bitcoin mining pools. It serves users in 100+ countries and stands out for its combination of no-KYC access, no-deposit bonus structure, and a unique hybrid trading model that combines traditional order books with an automated market maker (AMM).

CoinEx lists 700+ trading pairs and is particularly notable for its accessibility: users can register with just an email address and start trading immediately without identity verification. The no-deposit bonus structure — where some tasks can be completed without depositing funds — is genuinely rare among centralised exchanges. CoinEx also offers USDT-margined futures (up to 100× leverage), staking, and P2P trading.

The exchange underwent a security incident in September 2023 when approximately $70 million in hot wallet funds were compromised. Importantly, CoinEx fully reimbursed all affected users within weeks — a response that compares favorably to some other exchange security incidents. Post-incident, the exchange has strengthened its security architecture. The founding ViaBTC connection provides institutional credibility: ViaBTC has operated Bitcoin mining infrastructure since 2016 and has its own separate track record.

CoinEx's primary limitation is liquidity depth: it has lower daily trading volume and smaller order books than the top five exchanges on this list. This makes CoinEx best suited for small to medium positions on major assets — large orders will face meaningful slippage on most pairs. Standard spot fees (0.2%/0.2%) are higher than MEXC, Bybit, or Binance, though CET token holdings reduce this. For users who want the lowest friction to begin trading crypto without depositing funds or sharing identity documents, CoinEx is the strongest option on this list.

faqAppend.question: Is Phemex safe and legitimate?
faqAppend.answer: Phemex is a legitimate cryptocurrency exchange founded in 2019 by a team of eight former Morgan Stanley executives, bringing traditional financial market expertise to the crypto derivatives space. Phemex has grown to serve several million users globally and has maintained a clean security record since founding — no major breach or fund loss has been reported. The exchange uses a separate cold wallet architecture and publishes proof-of-reserves data. Phemex does not hold prominent licences from the FCA, SEC, or VARA, operating under an offshore model. Its Morgan Stanley founding team provides stronger institutional credibility than most newer exchanges.

faqAppend.question: What is Phemex's no-KYC policy?
faqAppend.answer: Phemex allows users to register and begin trading without identity verification. Without KYC, daily crypto withdrawal limits apply — typically up to a moderate threshold. Completing KYC (government ID + facial recognition) removes these limits and enables fiat deposit/withdrawal services. Phemex's no-KYC accessibility is a notable feature given its focus on professional derivatives trading — it provides a relatively rare combination of high-leverage futures access without mandatory identity verification. Users who value privacy alongside trading sophistication find Phemex an appealing option.

faqAppend.question: What is Phemex Gold Membership?
faqAppend.answer: Phemex offers a premium Gold Membership subscription that eliminates spot trading fees entirely — 0% for both maker and taker. The Gold Membership is purchased with a monthly or annual fee. For traders who do a significant volume of spot trading, the fee savings can more than offset the membership cost. Gold Membership also provides additional benefits including enhanced API rate limits and access to exclusive promotions. The membership model is unique among exchanges in this comparison — it trades a subscription cost for zero transaction fees rather than a trading volume-based tier system.

faqAppend.question: What are Phemex's trading fees?
faqAppend.answer: Phemex spot trading fees for standard users are 0.1% maker and 0.1% taker — with Gold Membership, spot trading is completely free (0%). Futures perpetual fees are 0.01% maker and 0.06% taker — one of the most competitive futures fee structures available, matching Bybit. No KYC is required to access these rates. The combination of 0.01% futures maker fees and a zero-fee spot membership makes Phemex extremely cost-efficient for high-volume traders who use both products.

faqAppend.question: What leverage does Phemex offer?
faqAppend.answer: Phemex offers leverage up to 100× on BTC/USD perpetual contracts and varies by trading pair for other assets. Leverage tiers are available in steps from 1× to 100×. Phemex's leverage levels are comparable to Bybit and Binance. The platform includes robust risk management tools including stop-loss, take-profit, and trailing stop orders — important for managing leveraged positions. New accounts start with a lower default leverage setting and must manually adjust to access higher multiples.

faqAppend.answer: Phemex is available in most countries globally but restricts access for US residents and several other jurisdictions with strict cryptocurrency regulations. The exchange is particularly popular among traders in Asia, Europe, Africa, and Latin America who value no-KYC access and professional-grade derivatives tools. faqAppend.answer: Phemex's welcome bonus reaches up to 8,800 USDT across tiered task rewards. The 8,800 USDT maximum requires a substantial first deposit and very significant futures trading volume — this is not a typical user outcome. phemex.editorNote: Built for professional derivatives traders. The unusual combination of no-KYC access and an 8,800 USDT ceiling makes it uniquely positioned. Best for experienced traders comfortable with leverage. The Gold Membership (zero spot fees) is genuinely compelling for active traders.
phemex.longDescription:
Phemex is a cryptocurrency derivatives exchange founded in 2019 by a team of eight former Morgan Stanley quantitative traders and executives. This Wall Street founding background distinguishes Phemex from most other exchanges in this comparison — the platform was built from the ground up with professional trading infrastructure as the primary design objective rather than being adapted from a consumer-first product.

Phemex's core offerings are contract trading (USDT-margined and coin-margined perpetual futures with up to 100× leverage), spot trading (200+ pairs), and copy trading. Its most distinctive feature is the Gold Membership subscription, which provides completely free spot trading (0% maker and taker) in exchange for a monthly or annual fee — a fee-for-subscription model unique in this comparison. Futures fees are 0.01% maker and 0.06% taker, matching Bybit's highly competitive rates. Phemex also allows trading without KYC verification at moderate withdrawal thresholds — combining no-KYC access with professional-grade leverage instruments.

Phemex operates under an offshore corporate structure without prominent named licences from FCA, SEC, or VARA. Its primary trust signals are the founding team's Morgan Stanley background, a clean security track record since 2019, and published proof-of-reserves data. Phemex is not available to US residents and has restricted access in several other jurisdictions.

The welcome bonus of up to 8,800 USDT is one of the higher headline figures on this list, but is misleadingly structured — the majority of the reward requires substantial first deposit and very high futures trading volumes to unlock. Most standard new users completing a moderate deposit and initial trading activity can expect 50–200 USDT in bonus vouchers. All vouchers expire within 30 days and cannot be directly withdrawn.

faqAppend.question: How does Bitunix compare to established exchanges?

bitunix.editorNote: Newest exchange here (est. 2022). Streamlined account setup and competitive futures fees. Bonus is real but counterparty risk is higher than established platforms. Recommended for experienced users only — not for beginners.
bitunix.longDescription:
Bitunix is a cryptocurrency futures exchange founded in 2022, making it the newest platform on this list. It focuses primarily on derivatives trading with a streamlined account setup process and competitive fee structure.

Bitunix's primary offering is USDT-margined perpetual futures with leverage up to 125× on major pairs. Futures fees are 0.02% maker and 0.06% taker — competitive with Bybit and among the lowest in the market. The platform also offers spot trading (limited pairs). Account and withdrawal limits should be confirmed on the official help center before registering.

As a newer exchange, Bitunix has a significantly shorter track record than established platforms like Bybit (2018), Binance (2017), or Gate.io (2013). It does not hold prominent regulatory licences and operates under an offshore structure. Daily trading volume is materially lower than the top five exchanges, which means less liquidity depth and wider spreads on most pairs beyond BTC and ETH.

Bitunix's welcome bonus reaches up to 1,000 USDT across task-based milestones (first deposit + trading volume). It is best positioned as a secondary account for experienced traders seeking accessible futures trading, or as an alternative for users who have encountered restrictions on larger platforms. For primary accounts, exchanges with established track records, named regulatory licences, and deeper liquidity — such as Bybit, OKX, or MEXC — provide meaningfully better risk profiles.

faqAppend.question: Does LBank offer P2P trading?

Users in Africa, Southeast Asia, and Latin America can buy and sell crypto using local bank transfers, mobile money services (like M-Pesa), and regional payment apps. P2P trading on LBank is free — there is no platform fee. The effective cost is the spread set by individual counterparties. lbank.longDescription:
LBank is a global cryptocurrency exchange founded in 2015 in Hong Kong, making it one of the older platforms on this list with over a decade of operational history. LBank has built its user base primarily by serving emerging markets in Asia, Africa, and Latin America, with particular strength in P2P trading for local fiat currencies and early listing of new token projects.

LBank's primary differentiators are its P2P marketplace and early token listings. The P2P market supports a wide range of local currencies including Nigerian Naira, Brazilian Real, Indonesian Rupiah, Turkish Lira, Indian Rupee, Vietnamese Dong, and dozens of others — providing fiat-to-crypto access in markets underserved by larger exchanges' direct fiat services. LBank is consistently among the first platforms to list newly launched tokens, attracting traders who want early exposure to emerging projects before they reach Binance or Bybit.

Standard spot trading fees are 0.1% maker/taker — in line with Binance and Bybit. LBank also offers USDT-margined perpetual futures (up to 50× leverage) and staking products. Trading volume and liquidity are materially lower than the top-tier exchanges — LBank is best suited for small to medium positions, as large orders will face meaningful slippage on most pairs.

LBank does not hold prominent regulatory licences from the FCA, SEC, or VARA. Its primary trust signal is its 10+ year operational track record. US residents cannot access LBank. The exchange's welcome bonus of up to 500 USDT is one of the lower headline figures on this list — reflecting LBank's positioning as a specialist platform for specific use cases (P2P local currencies, early listings) rather than a full-featured competitor to Bybit, Binance, or OKX.
